query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS customerId,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shipped_at >= '2025-09-09 14:05:16' AND o.shipped_at <= '2026-03-08 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6m,
  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shipped_at >= '2025-03-08 14:05:16' AND o.shipped_at < '2025-09-09 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON (
  (o.customer_id = c.id OR o.customer_external_id = c.external_id)
  AND o.order_status != -1
  AND o.is_shipped = 1
  AND o.shipped_at IS NOT NULL
)
GROUP BY c.id
LIMIT 5;

  SUM(CASE WHEN o.shipped_at >= '2025-03-08 14:05:16' AND o.shipped_at < '2025-09-09 14:05:16' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ordersIn6to12m
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN orders o ON (

  AND o.order_status != -1
  AND o.is_shipped = 1
  AND o.shipped_at IS NOT NULL
